mapper.select:
select *, father.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'father_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', father.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'father_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', father.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'father_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', father.nx_dfg_goods_amount 'father_nx_dfg_goods_amount', father.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'father_nx_dfg_father_goods_color', father.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'father_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', father.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'father_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', father.nx_dfg_father_goods_img_large 'father_nx_dfg_father_goods_img_large', father.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'father_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_color', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort' from nx_distributer_father_goods as greatGrand left join nx_distributer_father_goods as father on father.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id = greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id
where greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id = #{disId} and greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_level = 0 and greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id is not null order by greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, father.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort;

select grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'grand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'grand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_color'
from nx_distributer_father_goods as greatGrand left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as father on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = father.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id
where greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id = #{disId} and greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_level = 0 order by greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort

select grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'grand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'grand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', grand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'grand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort 'grand_nx_dfg_father_goods_sort', greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_distributer_father_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_distributer_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_fathers_father_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_name 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_name', greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_nx_goods_id', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_img 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_img', greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_color 'greatGrand_nx_dfg_father_goods_color'
from nx_distributer_father_goods as greatGrand left join nx_distributer_father_goods as grand on greatGrand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = grand.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id left join nx_distributer_father_goods as father on grand.nx_distributer_father_goods_id = father.nx_dfg_fathers_father_id where greatGrand.nx_dfg_distributer_id = #{disId} and greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_level = 0 and greatGrand.nx_dfg_nx_goods_id is not null order by greatGrand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, grand.nx_dfg_father_goods_sort

SELECT nx_distributer_father_goods_id, nx_dfg_father_goods_name, nx_dfg_father_goods_sort, nx_dfg_fathers_father_id FROM nx_distributer_father_goods WHERE nx_distributer_father_goods_id IN
#{id}
